# anthropic_federation_rule (Resource)

Authorization rule binding an external OIDC identity (via issuer) to a service account. **Requires OAuth Bearer auth.** At least one of `match_subject_prefix` (other than wildcard-only), `match_claims`, or `match_condition` is required. For well-known shared issuers (GitHub Actions, GitLab, Buildkite, Terraform Cloud, Google), tenant identity MUST be constrained via an identity claim or tenant-pinning subject prefix.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Federation rule pinning a specific GitHub repo to the ci_deploy service
# account. Subject prefix pattern follows GitHub's OIDC sub format.
resource "anthropic_federation_rule" "github_repo_main" {
  name               = "deploy-from-sauter-website-main"
  issuer_id          = anthropic_federation_issuer.github_actions.id
  service_account_id = anthropic_service_account.ci_deploy.id
  oauth_scope        = "workspace:developer workspace:inference"

  match_subject_prefix = "repo:sauterdigital/website:ref:refs/heads/main"

  workspace_id           = anthropic_workspace.prod.id
  token_lifetime_seconds = 3600
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issuer_id` (String) Federation issuer ID. Immutable.
- `name` (String) Slug identifier. Unique within the org. Immutable after creation.
- `oauth_scope` (String) Space-separated OAuth scopes (e.g. `workspace:developer workspace:inference`). OAuth callers may only set workspace:developer or workspace:inference; other scopes require Console session.
- `service_account_id` (String) Service account whose tokens this rule mints.

### Optional

- `applies_to_all_workspaces` (Boolean) When true, enables this rule for every workspace (including future ones).
- `description` (String)
- `match_audience` (String) Exact match against the `aud` claim.
- `match_claims` (Map of String) Exact-match `{claim: value}` pairs against top-level string claims.
- `match_condition` (String) CEL expression over `claims`. Must evaluate to boolean.
- `match_subject_prefix` (String) Match the `sub` claim. Exact unless ending with `*` (prefix match).
- `token_lifetime_seconds` (Number) Lifetime of minted access tokens (60-86400). Defaults to 3600.
- `workspace_id` (String) Initial workspace to enable this rule for. Required unless applies_to_all_workspaces=true. Additional workspaces via `anthropic_federation_rule_workspace`.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
